items.text: 因此，如果你想改善照明，最有用的方法就是进行照明研究。 So if you want to improve your lighting, the number one most helpful exercise is doing a lighting study. 那么，如果不为每个新场景构建环境，而是使用一个环境 So what if instead of building environments for every new scene, you took one environment 做一个、两个、五个甚至十个不同的造型，然后开始匹配您最喜欢的电影的灯光？ and did one, two, five, or even ten different looks and started matching the lighting of your favorite movies? 你认为这样学得快，还是创造十种不同的环境学得快？ Do you think you'd learn faster that way or by creating ten different environments? 没有什么好争的。所以，我最喜欢的练习就是重新点亮环境。 There's no contest. So that's why my favorite exercise is relighting environments. 今天，我将向大家展示如何进行自己的照明研究、 And I'm going to show you how today, how to do your own lighting study, 在虚幻中构建外部照明的基础知识。 the fundamentals of building out exterior lighting inside of Unreal. 此外，我还将与大家分享我的框架，即在拍摄任何场景时都需要知道的四件事。 And I'll share my framework of the four things you need to know to match the lighting of any scene. 去年，我在《阿凡达：最后的气宗》的虚拟制作现场工作。 Last year, I worked on set for the virtual production of Avatar The Last Airbender. 而当您在拍摄现场使用虚幻技术时，您需要在一天的拍摄中进行 20 或 30 次灯光设置。 And when you're using Unreal on set, you need to go through 20 or 30 lighting setups in a single shoot day. 因此，当你试图将 CG 世界中的灯光与片场中的实际灯光相匹配时，你必须要快。 So you need to be fast when you're trying to adapt the lighting in the CG world to the practical lights on set. 因此，我为自己制定了一个框架，希望与大家分享，以便轻松匹配任何镜头的光线方向、 So I developed a framework for myself that I want to share to easily match the light direction of any shot, 无论是眼前的灯光，还是你最喜欢的电影剧照。 whether it's the on set lights in front of you or a still from your favorite movie. 这包括光线方向、光线大小、颜色和强度。 And that's light direction, light size, color and intensity. 我将向你们展示在我建造的这个水箱环境中应该注意什么，以及如何应用这些概念。 And I'm going to show you what to look for and how to apply these concepts in this tank environment that I built 为一部从未见过天日的短片，并介绍如何应用这些概念 for a short film that never saw the light of day and walk through how to apply these concepts 将这一环境的灯光与《龙纹身的女孩》剧照相匹配。 by matching the lighting of this environment to this still from The Girl with a Dragon Tattoo. 但首先，让我们从基础工作开始，谈谈你需要建立的三件事 But first, let's start with the groundwork and talk about the three things you need to build 虚幻中的任何外部照明设置。 any exterior lighting setup inside of Unreal. 好的。让我们来看看这个坦克示例项目。 All right. So let's take a look at this tank example project. 这是我们要讨论的三个问题中的第一个。 This is the first of three that we'll get into. 因此，让我们来了解一下在场景中创建外部日光设置所需的一切。 So let's walk through everything that you need inside your scene to create an exterior daylight setup. 其实很简单。你只需要三样不同的东西。 It's actually pretty simple. You just need three different things. 所以，让我把场景中的所有灯光都隐藏起来。 So let me hide all of the lights in the scene here. 我们所需要的就是我们的定向光，也就是我们的太阳。 And all we need is our directional light, which is our sun. 我们有天窗，它将成为场景中的补光和反弹光。 We have our skylight, which is going to be our fill and bounce light in the scene. 然后，我们需要某种方法来创造天空。 And then we need some way to create a sky. 因此，虚幻的默认天空系统是通过在场景中设置天空氛围来建立的 So Unreal's default sky system is set up by having a sky atmosphere in your scene 在你的定向光中，在你的细节面板中搜索氛围 and in your directional light, search for atmosphere in your details panel 然后启用大气层阳光。 and then enable atmosphere sunlight. 虚幻也有一个体积云系统，然后您就可以在云层上看到太阳的方向。 Unreal also has a volumetric cloud system and then you'll get sun direction on the clouds. 或者您也可以使用 HDRI，从 Polyhaven 等网站获取 HDR 纹理。 Or you can use an HDRI by getting an HDR texture from a website like Polyhaven 然后将其直接插入未点燃的材料中。 and then plugging it directly into an unlit material. 因此，你只需输入发射色。 So you just have your emissive color input. 然后在内容浏览器下，按下所有文件夹并输入反向、 And then under your content browser, if you press the all folder and type in inverse, 你会看到有一个叫做球面反法线的对象、 you'll see that there's this object called sphere inverse normals, 这是一个包含在引擎中的网格。 which is a mesh that's just included in the engine itself. 你可以将其拖入场景，然后应用 HDRI 材质。 And you can just drag that into your scene and then just apply your HDRI material. 然后你可以旋转它，然后调整材质实例内部的颜色。 And then you can rotate it around and then adjust the color inside of your material instance. 还有一个名为 HDRI 背景的插件。 There's also a plugin called HDRI backdrop. 如果在场景中启用了这一功能，就可以点击快速添加演员菜单、 And if you have this enabled in your scene, you can click on your quick add actors menu, 转到灯光，然后拖入 HDR 背景。 go to lights and then drag in an HDR backdrop. 这将创建一个弯曲的 HDRI 背景，并在其组件内部创建一个天窗。 And this will create a curved HDRI backdrop and it'll create a skylight inside of its components. 而且场景中只需要一个天窗。 And you only want one skylight in your scene. 因此，要么使用 HDRI 背景，要么在大纲中加入天窗。 So either embrace using this HDRI backdrop or include a skylight in your outliner. 但是，使用 HDRI 背景，您可以通过这里的几个滑块来调整强度和大小 But using the HDRI backdrop, you can adjust the intensity and size with a couple sliders here 您的天窗就会自动重新计算。 and your skylight will automatically recalculate. 这就是使用它的真正好处。 That's the real advantage of using this. 但除此之外，如果你有自己的 HDRI 应用于反演球体、 But otherwise, if you have your own HDRI applied to your inverse sphere, 您可能需要手动更新天窗。 you may need to manually update your skylight. 您只需启用或禁用实时捕捉选项就可以做到这一点。 And you can do this by just enabling and then disabling the real time capture option. 这样就可以重新计算场景，改善一些反射效果。 And this will recalculate your scene and you'll improve some of your reflections. 然后你就会开始反射出真正的光色。 And then you'll start to reflect the real light color. 最后，还可以加入指数高度雾、 And then lastly, you can add in an exponential height fog, 这是增加这些大型外部场景深度的好方法。 which is a great way to add depth into these larger exterior scenes. 否则，我们就无法将前景中的坦克与其他坦克区分开来。 Otherwise, we don't get any separation between this tank in the foreground 以及他身后的黑色建筑。 and the black buildings behind him. 但加入雾气后，就能清晰地将它们分开 But by adding in the fog, you get a clear separation 你可以看到坦克与背景之间的距离。 and you can see the distance between this tank and the background. 有时，这有助于将一些 CG 建筑融入天空本身。 Sometimes this can be helpful to integrate some of your CG buildings into the sky itself. 因此，把雾的密度增加到一定程度就可以了、 So by increasing the fog density to something high, 我们可以改变雾的散射颜色，使雾与背景相匹配。 we can change our fog in scattering color to match our fog to the background. 您甚至可以使用这个滴管选择真正的颜色 And you can even use this eyedropper and select a real color 那是你的天空投下的。 that's being cast by your sky. 您还可以使用雾气截止距离，这样雾气就会适用于您的建筑物、 You can also use the fog cutoff distance so that that fog will apply to your buildings, 但不适用于您的天空球。 but not apply to your sky sphere. 我们可以通过使用雾截止距离来做到这一点。 And we can do this by using the fog cutoff distance. 如果我把它设得很低，比如 1000 厘米、 If I set this to something really low, like 1000 centimeters, 你可以看到，在这个距离之前，它都会起雾 you can see that it'll apply fog up until this distance 然后在 1000 厘米后将其完全切断。 and then it will completely cut it off right behind 1000 centimeters. 所以，如果我把这个推回去，让它不仅适用于我们的前景、 So if I push this back so that it applies not just to our foreground, 同时也是我们的背景建筑、 but also our background buildings, 我们可以保留它，使它只影响我们的建筑，而不影响天穹。 we can keep it so it just affects our buildings and doesn't affect the sky dome. 这就是整个技术系统。 Now that's the whole technical system. 这将为您提供一个动态照明系统的俯视图 That should provide you a good top-down view of the dynamic lighting system 当用于外部场景时。 when used for exterior scenes. 现在我们来谈谈艺术的基本原理 But now let's talk about the art fundamentals 让我们的灯光看起来像我们最喜欢的好莱坞电影。 that go into creatively making our lighting look like our favorite Hollywood films. 现在，我们照明框架的第一部分就是确定光线的方向。 Now, the first part of our lighting framework is figuring out the light direction. 让我们看看我们的阳光吧 So let's take a look at our sunlight 看看我们如何在场景中创造出有趣的形状。 and see how we can create interesting shapes in our scene. 因此，如果我禁用除定向灯之外的所有其他灯光、 So if I just disable all of the other lights except for our directional light, 照明的主要目的是在场景中创造出有趣的形状。 the main goal of lighting is to create interesting looking shapes inside of our scene. 这也是为了突出三维场景中物体的不同平面。 And it's also to bring out the different planes of the objects in our 3D scene. 取决于我们把灯放在哪里、 Depending on where we place our lights, 我们可以画出不同的平面，比如坦克的正面或侧面。 we can draw out the different planes like the front or the side of this tank here. 但是，在尝试匹配另一张图片的光线方向时，最重要的一点是 But the biggest thing to look for when trying to match the light direction of another image 你是否想从阴影的角度看问题？ is you want to look at the perspective of the shadows 它们就会真的指向灯光所在的地方。 and they will literally point to where the light is. 在单源场景中，这一点更容易分辨、 Now this is easier to tell in single source scenes, 但我们可以看到人物的影子穿过场景的视角。 but we can see the perspective of the character's shadow across our scene. 如果我把他们的影子追溯到他们的头顶、 And if I trace back their shadows to the top of their heads, 它们会准确无误地指向我们的光线在屏幕外的位置。 they will literally point to exactly where our light is going to be off screen. 所以，如果你看看地面上的阴影、 So if you look at the shadows on the ground over here, 如果你从这个角度来看 if you just look at the perspective, 它将指出您需要放置灯光的位置。 it'll point to where you need to place your lights. 当太阳真的不在屏幕上时，这一点会非常有用。 And this can be pretty helpful when the sun is really off screen. 是看影子，想想影子投在哪里。 Is look at the shadows and think of where are the shadows being cast. 在我们的场景中设置定向光、 And by having the directional light inside of our scene, 我们就可以开始旋转了。 we can start to rotate this around. 而这正是实时工作非常有用的地方 And this is where working in real time is really helpful 因为这样可以很容易地尝试各种想法，并快速迭代、 because it makes it very easy to try ideas out and iterate quickly, 尤其是在您试图匹配另一张图片的光线方向时。 especially if you're trying to match the light direction of another image. 接下来，我们应该看看我们的灯的大小。 The next thing we should look at is the size of our light. 我之所以说光线的大小，是因为光线越大越好、 And why I say the size of the light is because the larger a light is, 阴影就越柔和。 the softer the shadows are going to be. 想想灯泡的阴影是多么清晰、 Think of how crisp the shadows of a light bulb are, 与柔光箱相比，它的光源更小、 something that's a really small light source versus a soft box, 这是一个更大、更柔和的光区。 which is a much bigger, softer area of light. 现在，我们必须将这一想法应用到外部场景中。 Now we have to apply this idea to exterior scenes. 因此，相对于我们地球人来说，太阳本身真的非常非常小。 So the sun itself relative to us on planet Earth is really, really small. 这就是为什么在阳光明媚的日子里、 That's why on a sunny day, 你可以在地面上看到自己的影子。 you can look at the ground and see your exact shadow cut out on the floor. 但在阴天、暴风雨天或阴天、 But on a cloudier, stormier day or an overcast day, 太阳将光线投射到云层中，云层又将光线扩散到整个天空。 the sun is casting light into the clouds and they're diffusing it out across the sky. 现在，太阳变成了一个装满云朵的大软箱。 That sun now turns into a large, soft box filled with clouds. 因此，让我们试着与《男人的孩子》中的剧照相匹配 So let's try to match this still from Children of Men 并将我们的晴空转为阴天。 and switch our sunny sky into an overcast sky. 我将对颜色进行去饱和处理，让我们的距离更近一些。 I'll just desaturate the color to get us a little bit closer. 我还重开了天窗。 And I reset my skylight. 现在，我有了定向灯、 Now when I have my directional light, 我们开始从坦克上看到清晰的阴影。 we start to get these crisp shadows from our tank. 因此，我们可以通过改变光源角度来改变太阳光的大小 So we can change the size of our sunlight by changing the source angle 和源软角。 and the source soft angle. 你可以把这两个旋钮理解为光源角度就是你的漫射光 And the way you can think about these two knobs is the source angle is your diffuse light 而你的柔角源就是你的倒影。 and your source soft angle is your reflection. 因此，如果我们想柔化阴影，就将光源角度改为 100。 So if we want to soften our shadows, we'll change the source angle to 100. 在这里，您可以看到之前和之后的效果。 And here you can see the before and after. 现在是阴天，透过云层的光线较少。 Now on an overcast day, less light is getting through the clouds. 因此，你不会有同样的亮度。 So you wouldn't have the same brightness. 框架的最终目的是匹配光的颜色和强度。 The end of the framework is matching the light color and intensity. 这不仅需要匹配色调，还需要匹配饱和度。 And that's by matching not just the hue but also the saturation. 通常情况下，定向光的饱和度不会很高。 And typically you don't want to go very saturated on your directional light 因为它会使所有材料的色调变得不自然。 because it'll start to tint all of your materials in an unnatural way. 最后是我们的大气层。 And then lastly is our atmosphere. 所以我们又回到了指数高度雾、 So we'd go back to our exponential height fog, 改变雾的散射颜色，让我们更接近背景。 change that fog in scattering color to get us a lot closer to our background. 在这种情况下，我可以将雾气截断距离改得非常高。 And then in this case, I can change that fog cutoff distance to something really high. 因此，我将背景建筑和我们的天空穹顶雾化在一起。 So I fog the background buildings and our sky dome together. 从这里开始，我们开始玩弄我们的雾密度。 And from there, start to play around with our fog density. 以上就是如何应用虚幻的照明工具来创建外部日光场景的简要介绍。 So that's a quick look at how to apply Unreal's lighting tools to create exterior daylight scenes. 不管你信不信，这就是每一种照明场景。 And believe it or not, this is every lighting scenario when you get down to it. 不是阳光明媚，就是阴云密布。 It's either sunny or it's overcast. 但唯一没有考虑到的情况是，如果是晚上怎么办？ But the only other scenario that we've left out is what if it's night time 在那里，我们根本没有阳光。 where we don't have a sunlight at all. 下面我们就来看看如何模拟夜景。 So let's take a look at how to emulate night scenes. 而这并不是让我们的渲染结果与外面的夜景相匹配的方法、 And this is not how to make our renders match what night time looks like outside, 但电影中的夜晚是什么样的？ but what night time can look like inside of a movie. 我在很多外部场景中反复看到的一个典型技巧是 And typically the one trick that I've seen over and over again in a lot of these exterior scenes 就是在画框顶部隐藏一束亮光。 is by hiding a bright light at the top of our frame. 而这种灯通常非常大。 And typically this light is very large. 它的表面积很大，因此在地面上会产生很大的反光。 It has a big surface area so that it casts a really large reflection on the ground. 从这里的雨中外景可以看出这一点、 This can be seen in this rainy exterior here, 但不一定非要在下雨天才能达到同样的效果。 but it doesn't have to be raining to do the same trick. 可以看到，场景内部没有可见光。 You can see that there's no visible light inside of the scene. 这不是一个非常朦胧或有雾的场景，但我们有这样的光线，它隐藏着 It's not a very hazy or foggy scene, but we have this light that's hidden 在画面的顶端，混凝土上有反射。 at the top of frame here that's being reflected down on the concrete. 现在，重要的是确保我们的地面材料粗糙度低于 0.2。 Now it's important here to make sure that our ground material has a roughness below 0.2. 您可以在材料中或通过添加湿度贴纸来实现这一点。 And you can do this in the material or by adding in wetness decals. 因此，如果我们想重现这样的照明场景、 So if we wanted to recreate a lighting scenario like this, 我整理项目文件的方法是为特效创建不同的级别 the way I like to organize my project file is by creating different levels for my effects 这样，我就可以快速开关它们。 and lighting and that way I can quickly toggle them on and off. 几何形状将保持不变，但这样我就可以开启或关闭它们。 The geometry will stay exactly the same, but that way I can enable them on and off. 如果我看一下这张照片，我会说，我们的关键光无疑是 And if I look at this image, I'd say that our key light is definitely 这道光在屏幕外，反射到我们的地面上。 this light that's off screen and reflecting onto our ground. 现在，在进行照明研究时，你不必逐一模仿所有的东西、 Now when making a lighting study, you don't have to mimic everything one to one, 但我们不妨试着理解一下这个原始镜头的意图。 but it's worth trying to understand the intention of this original shot. 他们用这束光勾勒出人物和汽车的轮廓 And they're using this light to silhouette our character and the car here 用我们的两个物体和它们下面的影子做出两个有趣的形状。 and make two interesting shapes with our two objects and their shadows underneath. 我们可以从画面顶部看到一些体积。 And we get some volumetrics coming from the top of frame. 因此，如果我想在我们的夜景中加入这一点，我只需创建一个聚光灯。 So if I wanted to add that into our nighttime scene, I would just create a spotlight. 为了获得如此高的亮度，他们只能使用这种光源。 And in order to get this amount of brightness, they are just blasting this light. 太亮了，我们的画面曝光过度 It's insanely bright and overexposing our frame 并在我们最亮的高光处剪切白色。 and clipping white at our brightest highlights. 因此，我要把光照强度调得非常强烈、 So I'm going to change the light intensity to something really dramatic, 就像 1000 块钱一样，只是为了让我们的场面更壮观，我们可以随时收回来。 like 1000, just to really blow up our scene and we can always walk this back. 然后拖动这个 X 和 Y 控件，我们就可以开始移动它了 And then by dragging this X and Y control, we can start to move this around 并开始了解我们在场景中使用这些灯光能创造出什么类型的形状。 and start to see what type of shapes are we creating by using these lights in our scenes. 所以我想，如果有直升机的灯光从头顶照过来，那一定很酷 So I think it'd be cool if we had some helicopter light coming overhead 并在其上方拖曳。 and trailing over top of them. 因此，我们可以把这个带到他身后，直到我们得到一个看起来很酷的结果 So we could bring this behind him until we get a cool looking result 然后我们就可以将这盏灯向前旋转。 on our character himself, and then we can rotate this light forward. 这样我们就能看到下面水箱的一些阴影和倒影。 So that we get some of that shadow and reflection of the tank below. 您还可以通过改变灯光的距离来改变灯光的落差。 You can also change the fall off of the light by changing the distance of the light. 这样，灯光的衰减就会更均匀一些。 So the lighting fall off becomes a bit more even. 在你的场景中尝试做出一些非常大的形状总是很有帮助的。 And it's always helpful to try to achieve some really big shapes in your scene. 我们不希望所有这些微小的碎片，让一切都读起来像微小的细节。 We don't want all these tiny little shards where everything reads as micro detail. 设置灯光时，最好设置几盏能照亮大面积区域的灯光 When setting up lights, it's better to set up a few that light up big areas 并在我们的场景中创造出非常清晰的形状。 and create really clear shapes in our scene. 现在，我们把它放在了正确的位置，就可以进入序列器了。 And now that we have this in the right place, we could go into Sequencer. 现在，我们可以在头顶上使用体积光源了 And now we can have this overhead volumetric light that passes over top 只需设置几个简单的关键帧即可。 by just setting a few simple key frames. 我们可以通过确保我们有指数级的 And we can cast some volumetric light by making sure we have exponential 场景中的高度雾和体积雾设置为 true。 height fog in our scene and volumetric fog set to true. 接下来要检查的是我们的灯具尺寸。 The next thing to check is our light size. 我们能看到，因为阴影相当清晰明了、 And we can see because the
